root_text.sn48.58:1.1: Ekaṁ samayaṁ bhagavā rājagahe viharati gijjhakūṭe pabbate sūkarakhatāyaṁ.
root_text.sn48.58:1.2: Tatra kho bhagavā āyasmantaṁ sāriputtaṁ āmantesi:
root_text.sn48.58:1.3: “kiṁ nu kho, sāriputta, atthavasaṁ sampassamāno khīṇāsavo bhikkhu tathāgate vā tathāgatasāsane vā paramanipaccakāraṁ pavattamāno pavattatī”ti?
root_text.sn48.58:1.4: “Anuttarañhi, bhante, yogakkhemaṁ sampassamāno khīṇāsavo bhikkhu tathāgate vā tathāgatasāsane vā paramanipaccakāraṁ pavattamāno pavattatī”ti.
root_text.sn48.58:1.6: Anuttarañhi, sāriputta, yogakkhemaṁ sampassamāno khīṇāsavo bhikkhu tathāgate vā tathāgatasāsane vā paramanipaccakāraṁ pavattamāno pavattati.
root_text.sn48.58:2.1: Katamo ca, sāriputta, anuttaro yogakkhemo yaṁ sampassamāno khīṇāsavo bhikkhu tathāgate vā tathāgatasāsane vā paramanipaccakāraṁ pavattamāno pavattatī”ti?
root_text.sn48.58:2.2: “Idha, bhante, khīṇāsavo bhikkhu saddhindriyaṁ bhāveti upasamagāmiṁ sambodhagāmiṁ,
root_text.sn48.58:2.7: Ayaṁ kho, bhante, anuttaro yogakkhemo yaṁ sampassamāno khīṇāsavo bhikkhu tathāgate vā tathāgatasāsane vā paramanipaccakāraṁ pavattamāno pavattatī”ti.
root_text.sn48.58:2.9: Eso hi, sāriputta, anuttaro yogakkhemo yaṁ sampassamāno khīṇāsavo bhikkhu tathāgate vā tathāgatasāsane vā paramanipaccakāraṁ pavattamāno pavattatīti.
root_text.sn48.58:3.1: Katamo ca, sāriputta, paramanipaccakāro yaṁ khīṇāsavo bhikkhu tathāgate vā tathāgatasāsane vā paramanipaccakāraṁ pavattamāno pavattatī”ti?
root_text.sn48.58:3.2: “Idha, bhante, khīṇāsavo bhikkhu satthari sagāravo viharati sappatisso, dhamme sagāravo viharati sappatisso, saṅghe sagāravo viharati sappatisso, sikkhāya sagāravo viharati sappatisso, samādhismiṁ sagāravo viharati sappatisso.
root_text.sn48.58:3.3: Ayaṁ kho, bhante, paramanipaccakāro yaṁ khīṇāsavo bhikkhu tathāgate vā tathāgatasāsane vā paramanipaccakāraṁ pavattamāno pavattatī”ti.
root_text.sn48.58:3.5: Eso hi, sāriputta, paramanipaccakāro yaṁ khīṇāsavo bhikkhu tathāgate vā tathāgatasāsane vā paramanipaccakāraṁ pavattamāno pavattatī”ti.

translation_text.sn48.58:1.1: At one time the Buddha was staying near Rājagaha, on the Vulture’s Peak Mountain in the Boar’s Cave.
translation_text.sn48.58:1.2: Then the Buddha said to Venerable Sāriputta:
translation_text.sn48.58:1.3: “Sāriputta, considering what benefit does a mendicant with defilements ended, while still alive, continue to act with utmost deference for the Realized One or his instructions?”
translation_text.sn48.58:1.4: “Sir, it is considering the supreme sanctuary from the yoke that a mendicant with defilements ended, while still alive, continues to act with utmost deference for the Realized One or his instructions.”
translation_text.sn48.58:1.6: For it is considering the supreme sanctuary from the yoke that a mendicant whose defilements are ended, while still alive, continues to act with utmost deference for the Realized One or his instructions.
translation_text.sn48.58:2.1: And what is that supreme sanctuary from the yoke?”
translation_text.sn48.58:2.2: “It’s when a mendicant with defilements ended develops the faculties of faith,
translation_text.sn48.58:2.6: and wisdom, which lead to peace and awakening.
translation_text.sn48.58:2.7: It is considering this supreme sanctuary from the yoke that a mendicant with defilements ended, while still alive, continues to act with utmost deference for the Realized One or his instructions.”
translation_text.sn48.58:2.9: For this is that supreme sanctuary from the yoke.
translation_text.sn48.58:3.1: And what is that utmost deference that a mendicant with defilements ended, while still alive, continues to show towards the Realized One or his instructions?”
translation_text.sn48.58:3.2: “It’s when a mendicant with defilements ended maintains respect and reverence for the Teacher, the teaching, the Saṅgha, the training, and immersion.
translation_text.sn48.58:3.5: For this is that utmost deference that a mendicant with defilements ended, while still alive, continues to show towards the Realized One or his instructions.”

variant_text.sn48.58:1.3: pavattamāno pavattatī”ti → pavattayamāno pavatteti (bj); pavattamāno pavatteti (pts1ed)

reference_text.sn48.58:1.1: cck19.242, csp1ed14.205, csp2ed14.205, ms14S5_1218, msdiv528, pts-vp-pli5.234
